stub: He is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background.
personalization: He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with his own beliefs.
substantive: He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, he regularly explains how his decisions help to promote the interests of people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
text: He is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background. He is from your constituency. He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with his own beliefs. He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, he regularly explains how his decisions help to promote the interests of people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
